name: Taffy Apple Bits Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss apples with sugar and 2 tablespoons flour.
2. Arrange half the apples in a pastry-lined pie pan.
3. Sprinkle with half the Heath bits, and top with the remaining sliced apples.
4. In a medium bowl, stir together oats, brown sugar, and 1/4 cup flour. Cut in butter until mixture resembles crumbs.
5. Stir in walnuts, then sprinkle over apples.
6. Roll remaining pastry to 1/8 inch thickness.
7. Using a 1-1/2 to 2-inch leaf-shaped cutter, cut out about 20 shapes.
8. Place cut-outs around the edge of the pie (dampen edge of pastry with water to keep cut-outs in place).
9. Brush pastry with egg.
10. Cover pie loosely with foil.
11. Bake the pie in a 375 degree oven for 20 minutes.
12. Remove foil, and sprinkle with remaining Heath bits.
13. Bake for 20-25 minutes more, or until apples are tender, and the topping is browned.
14. Cool on a wire rack.
